title: Send Arcade
summary: Send Arcade is a consumer gaming surface from the broader Send ecosystem. Arcium includes it in the encrypted gaming ecosystem, but the public Send Arcade materials I reviewed do not document a specific Arcium-powered gameplay or backend feature.
description:
Send Arcade is a gaming entry in the Send ecosystem, with public project pages like Lana Roads showing a more casual, consumer-facing direction than the DeFi-heavy parts of Atlas. That makes it useful as a reference point for where encrypted state or protected progression systems could matter in user-facing games.

Arcium includes Send Arcade in its encrypted gaming ecosystem. That supports inclusion in Atlas, but I did not find a current Send Arcade page describing a specific Arcium-powered game mechanic or backend.

bodySections.title: What_Atlas_Reviewed
bodySections.body: Public Send Arcade pages are consumer-facing and game-oriented rather than infrastructure-first. That makes the project relevant to Atlas because it widens the scope of where confidential computation could eventually show up beyond finance and AI.

bodySections.title: Arcium_Relevance
bodySections.body: Arcium lists Send Arcade among gaming ecosystem partners. That is enough for Atlas inclusion, but not enough to label the project a confirmed Arcium integration from current public materials.

statusNote: Arcium includes Send Arcade in its encrypted gaming ecosystem coverage, but I did not find a current Send Arcade page documenting a specific Arcium-powered gameplay surface.

sources.label: Lana Roads
sources.note: A public Send Arcade game page illustrating the consumer gaming surface.

sources.label: Arcium Encrypted Ecosystem
sources.note: Arcium lists Send Arcade among gaming ecosystem partners.
